message.content:
Create the file `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/apck/apcd/dictionaries/firstnames.txt` containing the top 1,000 US first names from SSA baby names data (public domain). Include both male and female names — combine the top ~500 male + top ~500 female names, deduplicate, sort, and ensure exactly 1000 entries.

Requirements:
- One name per line
- All lowercase
- Alphabetically sorted
- No duplicates
- Exactly 1000 entries

These MUST be included (they appear in our test fixtures as common names): margaret, robert, james, susan, elena, michael, harold, karen, thomas, patricia, naomi, rebecca, angela, dorothy, edward, linda, miriam

These should NOT be included (not in SSA top 1000): priya

Write the complete file with 1000 entries. Use your knowledge of SSA baby name frequency data across multiple decades (we want names that are common across all ages, not just recent babies).
